message:
feat(cap): add MessagePort and BroadcastChannel as explicit host API surfaces

Bead: asupersync-1n453.3

- Add HostApiSurface::MessagePort and HostApiSurface::BroadcastChannel
  variants to the capability authority model
- Add HostApiAuthority::grant_messaging() convenience builder that
  grants all three messaging surfaces (MessageChannel, MessagePort,
  BroadcastChannel)
- Add 3 unit tests validating individual and bulk messaging grants
  against the deny-all default policy

These surfaces match the existing BrowserReactor host bindings
(register_message_port, register_broadcast_channel) and the
worker_channel coordination protocol.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
